audience_description: Academic Coordinators in Eduversal partner schools — the operational engine of the school's academic governance. Reports directly to the Principal. Owns: walkthrough scheduling, monitoring data integrity, induction programme oversight, school-wide PD planning, the Central Academic Database, the Lesson Plan Quality Report aggregation, and the Institutional Risk Assessment Report.

regulatory_anchors.title: Permendikbud 6/2018
regulatory_anchors.relevance: Coordinator under principal supervisi function — operational arm of managerial duty.

regulatory_anchors.title: Permendikdasmen 11/2025 — Beban Kerja
regulatory_anchors.relevance: 37 jam 30 menit framework that the Coordinator enforces across teaching staff.

regulatory_anchors.title: Permendikdasmen 13/2025 — Pembelajaran Mendalam
regulatory_anchors.relevance: Deep learning approach implementation across departments.

regulatory_anchors.title: Permendiknas 63/2009 — Sistem Penjaminan Mutu Pendidikan
regulatory_anchors.relevance: Quality assurance system — basis for monitoring rhythm and EDS cycles.

regulatory_anchors.title: Cambridge Handbook for Centres
regulatory_anchors.relevance: Coordinator ensures Cambridge subject leads meet centre-level QA expectations.

framework_anchors.cambridge_school_leader_standards_2023: Coordinator role anchors: instructional leadership, professional capacity, operations & management, ethics & professional norms.
framework_anchors.appraisal_framework_v2_1: Coordinator participates in appraisal cycles for AH sub-roles + leads HoD/Subject Leader appraisals where delegated.
framework_anchors.kpi_framework: Owns school-level KPI submission to HQ

recurring_tasks.title: Monday Leadership Stand-Up with Principal
recurring_tasks.description: 10-minute standing meeting with Principal to review previous week's database entries, identify Red Flag incidents, set the week's monitoring priorities.
recurring_tasks.first_time_guide: Keep it tight. Three questions: What did last week's data show? What needs eyes this week? Any escalations to flag?

recurring_tasks.title: Monday At-Risk Tracker review
recurring_tasks.description: Review the live At-Risk Tracker. Any student meeting trigger criteria who has not had an action initiated is flagged immediately.

recurring_tasks.title: Run weekly Walkthrough Coverage Report
recurring_tasks.description: Friday EOD: pull the Coverage Report from the Central Academic Database. Any teacher not visited in 14+ days = governance gap. Flag to relevant HoD/Subject Leader for recovery.
evidence_required: Coverage Report attached to weekly file

recurring_tasks.title: Friday Database Integrity Audit
recurring_tasks.description: Verify all walkthrough data from the week is entered (24h rule). Flag any gaps. Flag any incomplete entries. Pre-close ahead of weekend.

recurring_tasks.title: Coordinate Formal Supervision schedule
recurring_tasks.description: Maintain the rolling supervision schedule. Confirm next 2 weeks of scheduled observations. Send Pre-Observation reminder 1 week ahead. Confirm Post-Observation Conference within 48h of observation.

recurring_tasks.title: Weekly compliance digest to staff
recurring_tasks.description: Friday afternoon — issue a brief weekly digest to all academic staff: priorities, calendar, recognitions, reminders. Reduces ad hoc messaging.

monthly_tasks.title: Compile and submit Institutional Risk Assessment Report to Principal
monthly_tasks.description: First Monday of month. Aggregate of: Active ASPs, TISC count, ASP exit rate, walkthrough coverage gaps, LPQR trends, language compliance, At-Risk Tracker flow, top 3 PD priorities derived from data.
evidence_required: Reviewed in monthly ALT Dashboard meeting

monthly_tasks.title: Compile Lesson Plan Quality monthly aggregate
monthly_tasks.description: Receive LPQR Monthly Reports from every HoD/Subject Leader (first Monday). Aggregate into school-wide LPQR trend. Identify systemic gaps for PD investment.

monthly_tasks.title: Lead the monthly Learning Walk
monthly_tasks.description: Week 2 of month — coordinate full ALT for a 10-15 classroom Learning Walk with one pre-selected thematic focus. Compile Learning Walk Summary Report within 48 hours.

monthly_tasks.title: Update monthly Domain Heatmap and Language Compliance Heat Map
monthly_tasks.description: Aggregate walkthrough data into school-wide heatmaps. Distribute anonymised version to ALT for monthly Dashboard Review.

monthly_tasks.title: Review monthly PD investment requests against Heatmap evidence
monthly_tasks.description: All PD spending requests this month — does each trace to a Domain Heatmap signal or named IPDL goal? Reject popularity-only requests.

monthly_tasks.title: Audit Joint Walkthrough completion
monthly_tasks.description: Verify each HoD/Subject Leader has completed at least one Joint Walkthrough with Principal this month. Calibration is the discipline that prevents subjectivity drift.

termly_tasks.title: Co-lead Quarterly Academic Review (QAR) with Principal
termly_tasks.description: Triangulate Input × Output × Process data. Principal-facing QAR Findings Report. Drives instructional pivots for next quarter.

termly_tasks.title: Quarterly Pacing Audit
termly_tasks.description: Verify each section across all year groups is on schedule against Cambridge + national curriculum maps. Pacing Adjustment Plans for sections >1 week behind.

termly_tasks.title: Quarterly Bilingual Compliance Audit
termly_tasks.description: Aggregate CLIL monitoring data into Language Compliance Heat Map. Subjects below 70% English on 3 consecutive monthly cycles trigger formal Curricular Intervention Plan.

tasks.title: Distribute Annual Governance Calendar to all HoDs/Subject Leaders
tasks.description: All Week-4 PLC dates, Learning Walk dates, monthly report deadlines, supervision schedule, vertical audit dates. Confirmed in writing.

tasks.title: Lead ALT 6-Domain calibration session
tasks.description: Year-start training: 6 Domains, the 4-level scale, 'I noticed / I wonder' format, the No-Gotcha rule, calibration through Joint Walkthroughs.
evidence_required: Session attended by all ALT members

tasks.title: Open all IPDLs for the year
tasks.description: Verify every academic staff member has an opened IPDL with at least 2 outcome-based goals derived from previous IIP.

tasks.title: Launch baseline walkthrough cycle
tasks.description: Coordinate baseline walkthroughs for every teacher in W2-3. Establishes baseline domain impressions for the year.

tasks.title: Coordinate first HQ Specialist visit window
tasks.description: Liaison with Eduversal HQ to schedule Sem-1 school appraisal visits. Coordinate Specialist + Principal joint observation under EPDP.

tasks.title: QAR 1 leadership
tasks.description: End of Term 1 — co-lead QAR with Principal. First Input × Output × Process triangulation of the year.

tasks.title: Oversee EASE I administration across the school
tasks.description: Verify protocol compliance, manage submission to HQ, escalate any anomalies.

tasks.title: Coordinate end-of-Sem-1 grading integrity audit
tasks.description: Support Principal's 10% random work sample re-marking. Coordinate moderation sessions across departments.

tasks.title: Coordinate mid-year IPDL review cycle across all academic staff
tasks.description: Verify every HoD/Subject Leader runs mid-year IPDL reviews. Aggregate completion data for monthly Risk Report.

tasks.title: Cambridge Oct/Nov results aggregation and analysis
tasks.description: Compile cross-department Cambridge results for Principal review and yayasan reporting.

27-32.phase: Feb-April — Sem-2 school appraisal visit window

tasks.title: Coordinate Sem-2 HQ Specialist visit window
tasks.description: Schedule Sem-2 visits, prepare visit logistics, coordinate Specialist + Principal Leadership Observation under EPDP.

tasks.title: Oversee EASE II administration
tasks.description: Same as EASE I — protocol compliance, submission to HQ, escalate anomalies.

tasks.title: Lead Annual Vertical Gap Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate vertical curriculum maps from each subject. Identify school-wide prerequisite gaps, redundancies, cognitive plateaus. Updated map drives next year's scheme of work.

tasks.title: Annual Resource Suitability Audit
tasks.description: Aggregate resource feedback from departments. Submit Decommission/Renewal List to Principal for budget approval.

tasks.title: Coordinate annual appraisal cycle for all academic staff
tasks.description: Schedule, evidence packs, IIP filings, dispute resolution support. End-of-year archive.

tasks.title: Annual Governance Archive Audit certification
tasks.description: Verify completeness of Governance Archive: walkthrough records, IIPs, IPDL, ASP/TISC files, Board reports. Sign off and submit to Principal.

extra_tasks_first_12_weeks.title: Monthly coaching with Principal + assigned HQ Director
extra_tasks_first_12_weeks.description: First-year Coordinators meet monthly with Principal AND an HQ Director-mentor. Bring data dilemmas and coordination challenges.

extra_tasks_first_12_weeks.title: Complete Coordinator certification
extra_tasks_first_12_weeks.description: Eduversal Academic Coordinator certification — 8-hour foundational course covering Section 4 (Monitoring), Section 5 (Supervision), Section 7 (PLC facilitation), Section 11 (Data Governance). Required before independent operation.

provenance.regulatory_sources: Permendikbud 6/2018, Permendikdasmen 11/2025, 13/2025, Permendiknas 63/2009 — verbatim in docs/research/permendiknas/
provenance.framework_sources: Cambridge School Leader Standards 2023, Eduversal Leadership Competency Framework
provenance.operational_pattern_source: Adapted from Semesta School Academic Leadership Governance Handbook (Section 2.3 Academic Coordinator Role; Sections 11-12) with Eduversal-network adjustments — including HQ Specialist coordination and EPDP integration
